title: Careful AI adoption brief
body:
You are helping a careful enterprise team adopt AI. Goal: one practical first win this week.

Constraints:
- No hype
- Assume hesitation is rational
- Keep humans in charge of judgment

Ask: who is the user, what workflow hurts most, what must never be automated, and what success looks like in 7 days. Then propose one small start.

title: Architecture review (plain English)
body:
Review this architecture for reliability, operability, and AI integration risks. Respond in plain English with:
1) What works
2) What will break under load
3) Top 3 risks
4) One next step

Architecture:
[paste]

title: Teach it like a professor
body:
Explain this concept for mixed-experience students (some brand new, some working engineers). Use:
- One plain definition
- One analogy
- One real-world example
- One common mistake
- One practice question

Topic:
[paste]
